name: Corner accents
description: Four short vertical accents at the room's interior corners. Style-varied (cobblestone walls, oak fences, purpur pillars, dark oak logs, red concrete, …). Universal: applies to ANY room of ANY building.
placement_rules: Stacks 3 or 4 blocks of the style-specific accent at each of the four interior corners.
Skipped if the room is too small in width/depth or too low to fit the accent.
python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.corner_accent.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
